evals.name: simple-find
evals.prompt: find all the movies released in 1983
evals.expected_output: Find query with filter on year field equal to 1983

evals.name: find-with-filter-projection-sort-limit
evals.prompt: find three movies with alien in the title, show earliest movies first, only the _id, title and year
evals.expected_output: Find query with regex filter on title, sort by year ascending, limit 3, project _id/title/year

evals.name: geo-based-find
evals.prompt: find all the listings within 10km from the istanbul center
evals.expected_output: Find query with $geoWithin or $nearSphere for geospatial search, 10km radius

evals.name: find-with-nested-match
evals.prompt: Return all the properties of type "Hotel" and with ratings lte 70
evals.expected_output: Find query with nested field filters for property_type and ratings

evals.name: find-translates-to-agg-mode-count
evals.prompt: what is the bed count that occurs the most? return it in a field called bedCount (only return the bedCount field)
evals.expected_output: Aggregation pipeline with $group by beds, $count, $sort, $limit to find mode

evals.name: find-translates-to-agg-total-sum
evals.prompt: whats the total number of reviews across all listings? return it in a field called totalReviewsOverall
evals.expected_output: Aggregation pipeline with $group and $sum to calculate total

evals.name: find-translates-to-agg-max-host
evals.prompt: which host id has the most reviews across all listings? return it in a field called hostId
evals.expected_output: Aggregation pipeline grouping by host_id, summing reviews, sorting and limiting

evals.name: relative-date-find-last-year
evals.prompt: find all of the movies from last year
evals.expected_output: Find query with date filter for 2025 (current year - 1)

evals.name: relative-date-find-30-years-ago
evals.prompt: Which comments were posted 30 years ago. consider all comments from that year. return name and date
evals.expected_output: Find query with date range for 1996 (30 years before 2026), project name and date

evals.name: number-field-find
evals.prompt: get all docs where accommodates is 6
evals.expected_output: Find query with filter accommodates: 6

evals.name: find-with-complex-projection
evals.prompt: give me just the price and the first 3 amenities (in a field called amenities) of the listing has "Step-free access" in its amenities.
evals.expected_output: Find query with array filter for amenities, projection with $slice for first 3 items

evals.name: find-with-and-operator
evals.prompt: Return only the Plate IDs of Acura vehicles registered in New York
evals.expected_output: Find query with $and or implicit AND for vehicle make and state, project plate_id only

evals.name: find-with-non-english
evals.prompt: ¿Qué alojamiento tiene el precio más bajo? devolver el número en un campo llamado "precio" en español
evals.expected_output: Find query with sort by price ascending, limit 1, project price field renamed

evals.name: find-with-regex-string-ops
evals.prompt: Write a query that does the following: find all of the parking incidents that occurred on any ave. Return all of the plate ids involved with their summons number and vehicle make and body type. Put the vehicle make and body type into lower case. No _id, sorted by the summons number lowest first.
evals.expected_output: Find query with regex for 'ave', projection with lowercase operations, sort by summons_number

evals.name: find-simple-projection
evals.prompt: return only the customer email
evals.expected_output: Find query with projection for email field only

evals.name: basic-aggregate
evals.prompt: find all the movies released in 1983
evals.expected_output: Aggregation pipeline with $match on year 1983 (or preferably suggests find query)

evals.name: agg-filter-projection-sort-limit
evals.prompt: find three movies with alien in the title, show earliest movies first, only the _id, title and year
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match on title regex, $project, $sort, $limit

evals.name: agg-filter-and-projection
evals.prompt: find all the violations for the violation code 21 and only return the car plate
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match on violation_code, $project for plate

evals.name: geo-based-agg
evals.prompt: find all the bars 10km from the berlin center, only return their names. Berlin center is at longitude 13.4050 and latitude 52.5200. use correct key for coordinates.
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $geoNear or $match with geospatial query, coordinates in correct order [13.4050, 52.5200]

evals.name: agg-nested-fields-match
evals.prompt: Return all the properties of type "Hotel" and with ratings lte 70
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match on nested property_type and ratings fields

evals.name: agg-group-sort-limit-project
evals.prompt: what is the bed count that occurs the most? return it in a field called bedCount (only return the bedCount field)
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $group by beds, $count, $sort descending, $limit 1, $project to rename

evals.name: agg-group-sort-limit-project-2
evals.prompt: which host id has the most reviews across all listings? return it in only a field called hostId
evals.expected_output: Aggregation grouping by host_id, $sum reviews, $sort, $limit, $project

evals.name: relative-date-agg-30-years
evals.prompt: Which movies were released 30 years ago (consider whole year). return title and year
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match for year 1996, $project title and year

evals.name: relative-date-agg-last-year
evals.prompt: find all of the movies from last year
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match for 2025

evals.name: agg-array-slice
evals.prompt: give me just the price and the first 3 amenities (in a field called amenities) of the listing that has "Step-free access" in its amenities.
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match on amenities array, $project with $slice

evals.name: agg-multiple-conditions-match
evals.prompt: Return only the Plate IDs of Acura vehicles registered in New York
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match for vehicle make and state, $project plate_id

evals.name: agg-non-english
evals.prompt: ¿Qué alojamiento tiene el precio más bajo? devolver el número en un campo llamado "precio"
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $sort by price, $limit 1, $project to rename field

evals.name: agg-simple-sort-limit
evals.prompt: give me only cancellation policy and listing url of the most expensive listing
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $sort descending, $limit 1, $project specific fields

evals.name: agg-unwind-group
evals.prompt: group all the listings based on the amenities tags and return only count and tag name
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $unwind on amenities, $group by amenity, $count

evals.name: agg-size-operator
evals.prompt: which listing has the most amenities? the resulting documents should only have the _id
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $project using $size on amenities array, $sort, $limit, project _id only

evals.name: agg-complex-regex-split
evals.prompt: What are the 5 most frequent words (case sensitive) used in movie titles in the 1980s and 1990s combined? Sorted first by frequency count then alphabetically. output fields count and word
evals.expected_output: Complex aggregation with $match on year range, $split on title, $unwind, $group with $sum, $sort

evals.name: agg-super-complex-percentage
evals.prompt: what percentage of listings have a "Washer" in their amenities? Only consider listings with more than 2 beds. Return is as a string named "washerPercentage" like "75%", rounded to the nearest whole number.
evals.expected_output: Complex aggregation with $match beds > 2, $group with $cond to count washers, calculate percentage, format as string

evals.name: agg-complex-regex-string-ops
evals.prompt: Write a query that does the following: find all of the parking incidents that occurred on any ave. Return all of the plate ids involved with their summons number and vehicle make and body type. Put the vehicle make and body type into lower case. No _id, sorted by the summons number lowest first.
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $match regex for 'ave', $project with $toLower, sort by summons_number

evals.name: agg-join-lookup
evals.prompt: join with "movies" based on a movie_id and return one document for each comment with movie_title (from movie.title) and comment_text
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $lookup to join movies collection, $unwind, $project to extract fields

evals.name: agg-simple-projection
evals.prompt: return only the customer email
evals.expected_output: Aggregation with $project for email (or preferably suggests find query)
